firmwares.name: Standard BCI
firmwares.description: Core 6-channel biosignal acquisition firmware. 500Hz sampling rate, 14-bit resolution, binary packet protocol.

firmwares.name: High Speed 2CH
firmwares.description: Optimized for EEG/EMG with 2 channels at 512Hz. Features status LED animations and hardware switch support.

firmwares.name: BCI + Servo PWM
firmwares.description: Stable 512Hz acquisition with concurrent high-stability Servo control for prosthetic applications.

firmwares.name: RPS Game Logic
firmwares.description: Stand-alone Rock Paper Scissors game firmware with serial interface for direct hardware play.

firmwares.name: Bio-Gesture Logic
firmwares.description: Advanced firmware with on-device gesture detection (EMG/EEG/EOG) and auto-switching dashboard modes.
